judgment.summary: Profitable company with strong margins and cash flow, but facing near-term revenue headwinds and analyst growth concerns.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat consensus by 3.6%; next earnings date is 2026-07-29.
positives: Profit margin 22.3% and ROE 36.1% indicate strong profitability and efficient capital use.
Free cash flow of $9.59B is substantial and covers debt obligations.
Current ratio 2.37 and quick ratio 1.45 suggest good short-term liquidity.
Dividend yield of 1.8% offers a modest return to shareholders.
negatives: Revenue growth YoY is negative at -3.5%, indicating top-line challenges.
Analyst growth estimates for the current quarter (-19.5%) and fiscal year (-10.3%) are negative.
Total debt ($15.27B) exceeds total cash ($9.80B), resulting in net debt.
Mean analyst target price of $177.58 is below the current spot price, with a consensus 'hold' rating.

news.paragraph: Qualcomm (QCOM) is facing questions about its ability to capitalize on AI opportunities, a key growth driver for the semiconductor sector. While the company recently beat earnings estimates for the last quarter, analyst growth estimates for the current quarter and fiscal year are negative. The stock's beta of 1.49 suggests higher volatility relative to the broader market, and the consensus analyst target price is below the current trading level.

headlines.title: Does Qualcomm (QCOM) Have the Flexibility to Capitalize on AI Opportunities?

examples.body: $QCOM this is the next phase of AI. IOT of all things and evs. $500 EOY is my price target
$QCOM Jensen: “demand for agentic ai compute and physical ai is going parabolic.”.. stock market: sends qcom stock down ah.. yeah, doesn’t add up. qcom best po…
$QCOM if builds a base at this level it gets interesting.
$QCOM I like the inverse H&S on the daily chart. Wouldn't be surprised if this tests all-time highs again very soon.
